title: After Action Review — Tournament Scoring, Awards System, and Postseason Tracking
scope: Overhaul the CVL tournament scoring system so quality wins are properly scaled by opponent strength, fix media awards not appearing on player cards, revamp All-CVL team selection to use skill positions only, track coach postseason stats, add postseason history to team pages, and generate bowl/playoff MVPs.

rationale.item: Quality win scoring was too narrow — 7-tier system didn't differentiate enough; wins against teams ranked 51-100 counted for nothing; 20-point cap compressed elite resumes
Rankings were retroactive — end-of-season ranking used instead of game-time ranking, punishing teams for opponents' late-season collapses
Media awards (AP, UPI, The Lateral, TSN) never appeared on player cards
All-CVL teams included lineman slots despite linemen having no meaningful offensive stats
Best Kicker award went to players with 0 kick attempts because OVR-based fallback scored keepers with 99 kicking rating

delegation_events.decision: Skill positions only for All-CVL — followed user's basketball analogy, added kicker slot
delegation_events.quote: Followed the user's basketball analogy — like basketball dropping the center position as the game evolved, viperball doesn't need to force lineman selections when there are no meaningful stats.

delegation_events.decision: Remove the quality win cap — let truly elite schedules stand out
delegation_events.quote: A team with two top-5 wins looked the same as a team with four. Removing the cap lets truly elite schedules stand out in the power index.

delegation_events.decision: Game-time rankings for quality wins instead of end-of-season
delegation_events.quote: Rankings at time of play matches how real-world selection committees evaluate resumes. Beating a team that was #3 when you played them is a top-5 win regardless of where they finish.

delegation_events.decision: Combined postseason stats (bowls + playoff) rather than separate
delegation_events.quote: Variable playoff field sizes mean the line between bowl and playoff isn't as meaningful.

actions.description: New 5-tier quality win scoring; uncapped quality wins component; _get_rankings_at_week() for game-time rankings; _pick_game_mvp() for bowl/playoff MVPs; MVP assignment in _play_round() and simulate_bowls()
Removed lineman slots from _AA_SLOTS; added kicker slot + kicker scoring pipeline; 50% games-played floor in _best_in_position(); fixed Best Kicker to require actual kick attempts
Added conference_titles, playoff_wins, bowl_wins, bowl_appearances to dynasty Coach; AI coaching staff gets W/L/seasons/championships/bowl wins updated each season
Awards endpoint now calls compute_media_awards() and _apply_awards_to_players(); coach serialization exposes new postseason fields
Poll ranking history on team browser; Postseason Media Awards section on awards page
Coach career display: Conf. Titles, Postseason Apps, Postseason Wins
Postseason game data and coach stats passed to templates
New 'Bowls & Playoff Appearances' section with result/opponent/score/MVP
Postseason Apps and Wins on coach page

section_headers_original: After Action Review — Tournament Scoring, Awards System, and Postseason Tracking
unmapped_content: Branch: claude/tournament-win-scoring-NMcw8. 5 commits: 2c3ef4a (5-tier quality wins), 07e2a78 (remove cap), b0f10b2 (game-time rankings + poll history), 7f1073b (media awards + All-CVL slots), 92d6ac2 (coach postseason stats + team postseason section + bowl/playoff MVPs). Quality win tiers: 10 pts (top 5), 8 pts (top 10), 5 pts (top 25), 3 pts (top 50), 1 pt (top 100). MVP composite score: yards + TDs + kick pass yards + tackles + sacks + WPA, position-agnostic. Impact summary: harder schedules get more credit; no retroactive ranking inflation; media awards appear on player cards; no 2-GP wingbacks making First All-CVL; no keepers with 0 kicks winning Best Kicker.
parser_notes: Date confirmed: 2026-03-21. No validation claims or non_actions. Delegation_events includes one 'joint' (user's basketball analogy) per the design decision text.
